steps.t: Baziphâr is likely still hiding in Tâkhdar, below Dâr Laja. Find Baziphâr and scold him for hiding below the city.

Baziphâr is still hiding in Tâkhdar below Dâr Laja.
Hanâth is waiting at The Din of Arms in the Tor-gardens, in the western side of Umbar Baharbêl. Hanâth will surely be grateful to hear her husband has…
